howItWorks.intro: This dog food cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Daily Cups
rules.explanation: Base feeding amount scaled by dog size and activity.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much should I feed my dog?
faq.a: Generally 1/2 cup per 10-15 lbs of body weight per day, adjusted for activity.

faq.q: Is premium dog food worth it?
faq.a: Higher-quality food often means better nutrition, fewer health issues, and smaller portions.
